requirement: the README gets a newcomer to a first result quickly

findings.observation: A short install-then-command sequence is present (npx skills add; qualitymd --version; /quality setup|wizard|evaluate) plus an Install section, so a newcomer has copyable next steps.

No representative output is shown for any command, and the only built deterministic 'result' a newcomer can reach unaided is lint; the evaluation surface that produces the headline result is skill-driven and partly planned, so 'see a real result' is not demonstrated.
CI exit-code behavior is mentioned in prose ('exiting non-zero on errors so it drops into CI') but not shown as a command-plus-exit-code a newcomer could run.

rationale: A copyable install-then-command path exists, holding the floor, but the requirement asks the newcomer to see a real result with representative output and exit-code behavior — none of which is shown. Rated minimum.
